response.original_title: Complete Step-by-Step Guide on How to Add Passengers to Your Existing Royal Caribbean Cruise Booking Online
response.overview: To add a passenger to your Royal Caribbean Cruise, you must contact Royal Caribbean Customer Relations directly ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] or reach out to your travel agent, as this cannot be done online. Addition requests are subject to ship capacity, maximum suite occupancy, and may trigger a re-pricing of the booking at current rates. Direct Booking: Call Royal Caribbean Reservations in North America at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 (available Monday–Friday, 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Saturday 6:00 AM to 3:30 PM, and Sunday 7:00 AM to 3:30 PM PST). To add a passenger to an existing Royal Caribbean Cruise, you must contact Royal Caribbean Customer Service directly at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] or reach out to your travel agent. This process cannot be done online through the Royal Caribbean website or app because it requires manual verification of ship capacity and lifeboat limits. Contact Support: Call Royal Caribbean Cruises directly at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] you used to book the trip.
response.title: Complete Step-by-Step Guide on How to Add Passengers to Your Existing Royal Caribbean Cruise Booking Online
